## What does this PR do?
[Clear description]

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring

## Algorithm changes?
If yes, explain the change:
- [ ] Added new algorithm
- [ ] Modified existing algorithm
- [ ] No algorithm changes

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass: `mvn test`
- [ ] Integration tests pass: `mvn verify`
- [ ] Coverage >= 80%: `mvn jacoco:check`
- [ ] No regressions in benchmarks

## Checklist
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] Swagger docs updated
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] Benchmark docs updated if needed
- [ ] Correlation ID in all new logs
- [ ] No TODO/FIXME left in code

## Performance Impact
Expected change in performance:
- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Minor improvement (< 10%)
- [ ] Significant improvement (> 10%)
- [ ] Minor regression (documented)
